New on n8n Cloud (v2.11): Create a @firecrawl account without leaving the canvas and claim 100K credits from @firecrawl for scraping, searching, and browsing the web for AI-ready data 🔥 

This builds on an update to n8n Cloud’s managed authentication that makes credential setup https://t.co/JbXAhgmrtv
comp_top.name: n8n.io

comp_top.text:
AI agents aren't just chatbots anymore. 🤖 They're detecting fraud, optimizing logistics, running customer support, monitoring cybersecurity threats, and more.
We put together 15 real examples, and each one comes with an n8n workflow template so you can actually build it.
comp_top.name: n8n.io

comp_top.text:
This month's Community Challenge comes with everything you need. Free Cloud Starter license. 100K @firecrawl credits. One-click connect straight from the canvas. All you bring is the build. 🔥
🔗 Read more and enter the challenge here: https://t.co/PVl8PfM0iP
#n8nChallenge https://t.co/5uslBRm1vN
comp_top.name: n8n.io

comp_top.text:
Most AI workflow failures aren't model problems.
Normalize inputs, validate outputs, route on confidence. Wrap your AI steps in deterministic logic and they'll actually hold up in production.
New guide by Elvis Saravia (@omarsar0) with five importable templates: https://t.co/OEPQbNMgbR
comp_top.name: n8n.io

comp_top.text:
AI is not the starting point. Process is. In the new n8n Podcast episode, Dave Ebbelaar explains why the smarter move is to start with small internal workflows, prove value fast, and only use AI where it earns its place.
🎧 Listen now: https://t.co/FKheVAToSX https://t.co/yFAD3l6Aho
comp_top.name: n8n.io

comp_top.text:
Jan on building n8n and the realities of AI 🎧
On this episode of the EU Startups Podcast, he breaks down why n8n was built, why data control and self-hosting matter more than ever, and what it takes to build AI systems people can rely on. Listen here 👇
https://t.co/oZubwcNrBh
comp_top.name: n8n.io
